calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Carl Hee, is present in propria persona.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Carl Hee is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: CARLETON EDWARD LEE. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Reset To Dec-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Petitioner: Carl Lee, present in pro per without Proof of Publication of the OSC for Change of Name.
Matter is continued to Dec. 11, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to obtain an original Proof of Publication, and file with the Court.
